title: A Boy & His Dragon
overview: Ash Blake, "number-one problem child" at Ansullivan Dragonar Academy, is worried that he's still without his very own partner dragon, or "parr". When the time comes, will his parr be everything he expected--or nothing like he'd ever imagined?

title: Ties That Bind: The Astral Flow
overview: As Ash and his parr get to know each other better, he discovers he's not the only one with a keen interest in learning what makes her tick.

title: Riot in the Streets
overview: A dangerous rogue dragon runs amok in the town of Ansullivan. Which young dragonar will step up to face it, and can the mighty creature be defeated?

title: Iron Blood Valkyrie
overview: The infamous Iron Blood Valkyrie pays a visit in the wake of the Necromancia attack, striking fear into the heart of... Princess Silvia?

title: Ice Blue Princess
overview: Princess Veronica's visit has Silvia trying to prove her Dragonar mettle, but it may also have drawn unwanted attention from an undercover assassin.

title: Blue Brionac
overview: A tense hostage situation at St. Valeria Church puts Ash and friends to the test. It all comes down to the Silver Knight and the Ice Blue Princess!

title: Lucca Sarlinen
overview: As training camp nears, eccentric Dragonar prodigy Lucca Saarinen is having parr trouble. Can they figure out what's wrong before it turns deadly?

title: Moonlit Roar
overview: A group of promising Dragonars attends training camp, where, despite the danger, Ash persists in trying to get answers from Lucca's reticent parr.

title: Dragon Dance
overview: The end of training camp coincides with a devastating attack that puts the Dragonars on their toes. There may be more to Milgauss than meets the eye.

title: Assembly in Fontaine
overview: Silvia, Ash, and Eco arrive in Fontaine for the Continental Congress and meet the Paladin. Meanwhile, Milgauss begins putting his plans into action.

title: Yggdrasil Rising
overview: At the masquerade ball, Silvia pursues her hunch about Milgauss's true identity. Eco faces a hard truth that inadvertently gets her into hot water.

title: The Star-Branded Dragonar
overview: The ball is interrupted when Eco adopts her dragon form. Mordred reveals himself, and tries to possess Eco's dragon body. Can the others stop him?
